title: Crispy Cozy Kenyan Vegetable Skewers
description: A mustardy and crispy Kenyan dish featuring garlic powder and infuse-oil, perfect for a cozy snack. This raw-friendly recipe is easy to make and delicious to eat.

ingredients.name: mixed vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as bell peppers, onions, and mushrooms

instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together garlic powder, infuse-oil, mustard, salt, and black pepper.
Add the mixed vegetables to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated vegetables onto the skewers.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle the skewers with lemon juice.
Bake the skewers in the preheated oven for 20 minutes.
Remove the skewers from the oven and garnish with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
Serve the skewers hot and enjoy.
